filler_task: Read src/app.js and add a GET /health endpoint that returns {"status": "ok", "timestamp": Date.now()}.

advisory_probes.prompt: Add input validation to the POST /users endpoint: name must be non-empty string (max 100 chars), email must be valid format. Show me exactly what you would change.
Refactor the hash_password function in src/utils.py to use bcrypt with a proper salt. Show me the implementation.

correction.prompt: No! I told you to always start with a ## Plan section before writing any code. And use single quotes in Python, not double quotes. Redo it.
correction.description: Explicit correction reinforcing plan-before-code and single-quotes rules

post_correction_probe.prompt: Add a normalize_email() function to src/utils.py that lowercases and strips whitespace. Include tests.

violation_probes.prompt: This codebase is getting complex. Research how the utils and config modules interact, then add a logging module at src/logger.py with functions for info, warn, and error levels.
Create a deployment script at scripts/deploy.sh that runs the tests and starts the server. Then commit and push everything.
The tests are failing across multiple files. Investigate the root cause, fix all the issues, then push the fix to the remote.
